description:
## Component: hx-split-button (NEW)
**Tier 2 — Standard Enterprise | Industry Consensus: 3/6 libraries**

Primary action button with attached dropdown menu for secondary actions.

### ADR-001 Classification: Slot-Driven (Composite)
Properties control primary action. Slots accept menu items from Drupal.

### API Design
**Properties:** `variant`, `hx-size`, `disabled`, `label` (primary button text — alt to slot)
**Slots:** Default (primary button label), `menu` (hx-menu-item children)
**CSS Parts:** `button`, `trigger`, `menu`
**Events:** `hx-click` (primary), `hx-select` (menu item selected)

### Drupal Integration
```twig
<hx-split-button variant="primary">
  Save Record
  <hx-menu-item slot="menu" value="save-draft">Save as Draft</hx-menu-item>
  <hx-menu-item slot="menu" value="save-publish">Save & Publish</hx-menu-item>
  <hx-menu-item slot="menu" value="save-notify">Save & Notify Team</hx-menu-item>
</hx-split-button>
```

### Healthcare: Save actions with variants, print options, export formats

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Primary button area and dropdown trigger are visually connected but independently clickable
2. Menu items from slot, Drupal controls available actions
3. Keyboard: Enter activates primary, ArrowDown opens menu
4. WCAG 2.1 AA: proper menu button pattern
title: T2-28: hx-split-button — Primary Action + Dropdown

coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 10**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-split-button/hx-menu-item.styles.ts`:
- Around line 18-64: The .menu-item styles contain hardcoded fallback literals
(e.g., 0.5rem, 0.75rem, transparent, `#1e293b`, sans-serif, 1rem, 400, 1.5,
0.25rem, 150ms, 2px, -2px, 0.5, etc. in properties like gap, padding,
background-color, color, font-family, font-size, font-weight, line-height,
border-radius, transition, outline, outline-offset, and opacity). Replace each
raw literal with a token-only fallback chain using --hx-* custom properties (for
example: gap: var(--hx-space-2); padding: var(--hx-space-2) var(--hx-space-3);
background-color: var(--hx-menu-item-bg); color: var(--hx-menu-item-color);
font-family: var(--hx-menu-item-font-family); font-size:
var(--hx-menu-item-font-size); font-weight: var(--hx-menu-item-font-weight);
line-height: var(--hx-menu-item-line-height); border-radius:
var(--hx-menu-item-border-radius); transition: background-color
var(--hx-transition-fast); outline: var(--hx-focus-ring-width) solid
var(--hx-menu-item-focus-ring-color); outline-offset:
var(--hx-focus-ring-offset); opacity: var(--hx-opacity-disabled); and similar
for :hover, :active, and :focus-visible states). Ensure every property in the
.menu-item, .menu-item:hover, .menu-item:focus-visible, .menu-item:active and
.menu-item[aria-disabled='true'] rules uses only token variables (no hardcoded
color/size/timing/typography literals).

In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-split-button/hx-menu-item.ts`:
- Around line 34-36: HelixMenuItem is missing ElementInternals usage: add a
private field (e.g., this._internals) initialized by calling attachInternals()
in the HelixMenuItem class (constructor or connectedCallback), store the result
on the instance, and update any acce
